cards.title: Completely free — no surprises
cards.description: No hidden fees, no credit card. Sign up and start.

items.question: Does Insta Checkout take a commission from every transfer?
items.answer: No. Funds go directly to your InstaPay account. We are not in the transfer flow and take no commission.

items.question: Do I need to download an app?
items.answer: No. Insta Checkout works from the browser on mobile or desktop. Nothing to download.

items.question: Is the service really free?
items.answer: Yes. The free plan includes all core features — unlimited payment links, unlimited orders, and a full dashboard. No hidden fees.

items.question: How do you verify the customer actually paid?
items.answer: The customer uploads a screenshot of the InstaPay transfer confirmation. You review and confirm or reject from your dashboard — same as what you do now, but organized.

items.question: Is my data and my customers' data secure?
items.answer: Yes. All data is encrypted and links are unique per order. No one can access your account data except you.

items.question: I'm a small seller — is this for me?
items.answer: Yes, this was built for you. Whether you sell desserts on Instagram or clothes on WhatsApp — Insta Checkout is designed for sellers who sell on social media.

page.title: Register your business on Insta Checkout

page.signupSubtitle: Sign up in seconds — complete the rest from inside

step2.title: Create your account
step2.subtitle: Sign up so you can access and manage your store later
step2.forgotSent: Sent! Check your email and click the link to set a new password.
step2.forgotPrompt: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.fullNameMax: Full name must be under 100 characters
validation.businessNameMin: Business name must be at least 2 characters
validation.businessNameMax: Business name must be under 100 characters
validation.instapayLinkInvalid: Must be a valid InstaPay link (ipn.eg or instapay.eg)
validation.whatsappValid: Valid Egyptian WhatsApp number — e.g. 01XXXXXXXXX or 10XXXXXXXX
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

confirmation.title: You're all set! 🎉
confirmation.subtitle: Your account is ready. We'll send you a WhatsApp message — open WhatsApp and create your first payment link!

errors.serverError: Server issue — try again in a bit
errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.duplicateNumber: This number is already registered. Try a different number or contact us.
errors.networkError: Make sure you're connected to the internet and the backend is running
errors.googleNoEmail: This Google account has no email — try creating an account with email instead.
errors.accountCreated: Account created! Saving your store details...
errors.googleNotEnabled: Google sign-in is not enabled — enable it in Firebase Console
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not allowed — add it in Firebase → Authorized domains
errors.emailInUse: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.emailInUseSignIn: Email already registered. Signing you in…
errors.emailNotEnabled: Email sign-up is not enabled — enable it in Firebase Console
errors.invalidCredentials: Wrong email or password. Try again.
errors.userNotFound: No account with this email. Create a new account first.
errors.resetEmailSent: We've sent you an email to reset your password

instructions: Click the button below to open InstaPay and complete your transfer

step3.successSubtitle: Your payment details have been sent to {sellerName}. The seller will review and confirm your order soon.
step3.statusSubtitle: You'll get a confirmation once the seller verifies your payment. Usually takes a few minutes.

errors.cancelled: This payment link has been cancelled
errors.alreadyPaid: This payment link has already been used
errors.comingSoon: This link is being set up — the seller is still completing their profile. It will be activated soon.
